nasb.text: He did evil in the sight of the Lord, as his fathers had done; he did not depart from the sins of Jeroboam the son of Nebat, which he made Israel sin.

esv.text: And he did what was evil in the sight of the Lord, as his fathers had done. He did not depart from the sins of Jeroboam the son of Nebat, which he made Israel to sin.

cnv.text: 他行耶和華看為惡的事，好像他祖先所行的，沒有轉離尼八的兒子耶羅波安使以色列人陷於罪中的那些罪。

ccb.text: 他做耶和华视为恶的事，重蹈祖先的覆辙，没有离开尼八的儿子耶罗波安使以色列人犯的那些罪。
